name: Saurav Chopade
title: Frontend Engineer
summary: Creative and detail-oriented Frontend Engineer with production experience building responsive, performant, and accessible web applications. Delivered 2 live applications using React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Vite — a real-time AI calling dashboard with Twilio voice integration and an OAuth-secured multi-provider image search platform. TypeScript codebase coverage at 97% on the Image-Auth project. Skilled in component-based architecture, REST API integration, state management, OAuth 2.0 flows, and cross-browser compatibility. Oracle Cloud AI Foundations Certified.
achievements: Delivered 2 production React 19 / TypeScript applications — both live on Vercel with real users
Achieved 97% TypeScript codebase coverage on Image-Authentication project — ensuring type safety and reduced runtime errors
Built complex real-time React UI integrating Twilio voice SDK — live call controls, mic toggle, DTMF keypad, and recording status
Implemented multi-provider OAuth 2.0 login flows (Google, Facebook, GitHub) with zero unauthorized access incidents across 100+ test users
Reduced perceived frontend load time by ~40% through async API calls, loading state management, and client-side caching

projects.name: Image Search Platform — Multi-Provider OAuth
projects.description: Production full-stack image search app with 97% TypeScript codebase. Integrates Unsplash API with multi-provider OAuth 2.0 (Google, Facebook, GitHub) via Supabase Auth with Row Level Security. Zero unauthorized access incidents across 100+ test users. Built trending search analytics dashboard.

projects.name: ColdCaller.io — AI Cold Calling Dashboard
projects.description: Complex React 19 UI integrating Twilio SDK for real-time voice calling — live call controls, mic toggle, DTMF keypad, and recording status. Gemini AI auto-generates call scripts. Lead management with Excel import (SheetJS), status tracking, and analytics.

projects.name: Emotional Analysis App
projects.description: Emotion analysis app that detects user emotional state and provides corresponding solutions/guidance from the Bhagavad Gita. Built with TypeScript frontend and AI-powered emotion detection backend.

projects.name: Ether Soul — Web3 Platform
projects.description: Web3 platform with blockchain integration. Features decentralized application architecture with smart contract interactions and modern frontend built with HTML/CSS/JS.

experience.description: Built and maintained production React.js/TypeScript frontends integrated with Flask and Express backends. Integrated RESTful APIs, implemented OAuth 2.0 flows, and maintained reusable component libraries. Reduced integration time by ~35% and improved frontend performance significantly.

education.institution: GH Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur

certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate — Oracle — Aug 2025 to Aug 2027
